posts.author: Alysha (Alysha)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello -

I currently have a board set up that captures data from a form to create new items. I would like it to automaiclally send new items to the appropriate group in the board based on a status that is selected in the form. Currently the only options to do this are when the status is changed…but not created. Any advice or help would be much appreciated.

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Alysha ,

Would this automation work for you?

image1266×585 21.4 KB

Let me know if you have questions on how to set this automation up!

posts.author: Alysha (Alysha)
posts.cookedHtml: That did the trick! Thank you so much. Not sure why I didn’t think of that. THANK YOU!
